title: Logics for Artificial Intelligence

prerequisites.text: Admission into the Honours in Computer Science, or permission from the course convener. Familiarity with basic discrete mathematics is highly recommended.

outline: Logic plays a central role in many areas of Artificial Intelligence. This course will introduce students to Propositional Logic and Description Logics: logics frequently used in the area of Knowledge Representation and Reasoning. Description Logics are frequently used to represent formal ontologies. Topics covered include: Reasoning in propositional logic with tableaux algorithms; the Description Logic ALC; Reasoning in Description Logics with tableaux algorithms.
